meta.title: Your Name — Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Full-stack developer specializing in building exceptional digital experiences with modern web technologies.

hero.name: Your Name
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I build accessible, pixel-perfect digital experiences for the web.

about.heading: About
paragraphs: I'm a full-stack developer passionate about building web applications that are both beautiful and functional. With experience spanning front-end frameworks and back-end systems, I enjoy tackling complex problems and turning ideas into reality.

My journey in software development began with a curiosity about how things work on the internet. Today, I specialize in creating robust, scalable applications using modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, and cloud services.
When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge through technical writing.

items.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Led the development of core platform features, improving system performance and user experience. Architected microservices with Node.js and built interactive dashboards with React.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Developed and maintained multiple web applications serving thousands of daily active users. Implemented RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services.

items.title: Junior Developer
items.description: Built responsive web interfaces and contributed to backend development. Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an agile environment.

items.name: Project Alpha
items.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management, payment processing, and admin dashboard.

items.name: Project Beta
items.description: A real-time collaborative task management application with WebSocket-based updates and team workspaces.

items.name: Project Gamma
items.description: An API gateway service with rate limiting, authentication, and request logging for microservices architecture.

items.name: Project Delta
items.description: A developer portfolio and blog built with Next.js, featuring MDX content, SEO optimization, and dark mode.

items.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
items.description: Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and web development. Graduated with honors.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
